title: picris hieracioides subsp. japonica
intro: Picris hieracioides subsp. japonica, also known as Japanese hawk's beard or Japanese picris, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting digestion. In traditional herbal medicine, Picris hieracioides subsp. japonica can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its roots and leaves can be used in infusions and decoctions.
